query:
-- Delete the empty duplicate account (no name, no push token, no messages)
DELETE FROM client_accounts WHERE id = 240002;

-- Now migrate all remaining 10-digit phones to E.164
UPDATE client_accounts
SET phone = CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone NOT LIKE 'oauth:%'
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
  AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 10;

-- Migrate 11-digit phones starting with 1 to E.164
UPDATE client_accounts
SET phone = CONCAT('+', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone NOT LIKE 'oauth:%'
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
  AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 11
  AND LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 1) = '1';

-- Delete the empty duplicate account (no name, no push token, no messages)
DELETE FROM client_accounts WHERE id = 240002;

-- Now migrate all remaining 10-digit phones to E.164
UPDATE client_accounts
SET phone = CONCAT('+1', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone NOT LIKE 'oauth:%'
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
  AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 10;

-- Migrate 11-digit phones starting with 1 to E.164
UPDATE client_accounts
SET phone = CONCAT('+', REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''))
WHERE phone NOT LIKE 'oauth:%'
  AND phone NOT LIKE '+%'
  AND LENGTH(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', '')) = 11
  AND LEFT(REGEXP_REPLACE(phone, '[^0-9]', ''), 1) = '1';
